mapper.select: select count(*) > 0 from sys_plant sp where 1=1 and domain_url = #{domainUrl} and delete_yn = 'N' and use_yn = 'Y'
select sys_id , plant_cd , plant_nm , domain_url , use_yn from sys_plant sp where 1=1 and delete_yn = 'N' and use_yn = 'Y' and plant_cd != 'ADMIN' and domain_url = #{domainUrl}
